subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One! Thy letter hath arrived and its contents have been noted. Praise be to God, it betokeneth guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نامه ات وارد و بر مضمون اطلاع حاصل گشت الحمد لله دلالت بر هدایت
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @words vs deeds
